title: Customer Acquisition Analytics Platform
summary: Built a production analytics platform covering 11 customer acquisition dimensions across a major e-commerce marketplace, evolving from an ad-hoc promotion analysis into a VP-endorsed enterprise solution with natural language querying.

title: AI-Powered Data Engineering Workflow Suite
summary: Built an AI-powered end-to-end workflow that transforms how data engineers deliver on requests — from intake through multi-agent analysis to stakeholder-ready responses with documented, version-controlled SQL.

title: Proactive Supply Chain Monitoring System
summary: Transformed vendor relationship management from reactive firefighting to proactive issue identification by building a multi-layered alarm system that saves ~3,640 hours annually across 70+ managers.

title: Customer Purchase Journey Analytics (Trade Up)
summary: Designed a customer purchase journey analytics platform measuring base-to-premium product progression, with a novel customer classification methodology and an 8-stage data pipeline serving 7 product categories.

title: Foundational Data Layer Architecture (12 Metric Domains)
summary: Designed a comprehensive primitive data layer spanning 12 metric domains that serves as the single source of truth for all executive reporting, eliminating 11-20 hours/week of manual data preparation.

title: Liquidation Analytics Platform & Catalog Defect Viewer
summary: Built the central hub for liquidation data reporting — a multi-tab dashboard tracking 7 liquidation types with volume-adjusted metrics, plus a proactive catalog defect viewer that identifies issues before they cause financial losses.

title: Executive Vendor Analytics Platform
summary: Led the system redesign for executive-level vendor meetings with top 30 strategic partners, establishing formalized intake processes and standardized scorecards that reduced preparation time from 3-5 days to under 1 hour.

title: Cost to Serve Analytics Framework
summary: Led BI development for an SVP-sponsored initiative delivering the first vendor Cost to Serve analysis, establishing a replicable framework for transparent cost-based vendor negotiations.

title: Clickstream Analytics Data Pipeline
summary: End-to-end serverless AWS data pipeline for processing large-scale e-commerce clickstream data. Star schema design, PySpark transformations, Redshift Spectrum analytics, and event-driven alerting.

title: Enterprise Report Consolidation (31 → 1)
summary: Diagnosed and fixed critical fiscal year-end failures caused by hardcoded date logic, then consolidated 31 separate reporting jobs into a single automated process — eliminating 40+ hours of monthly maintenance.

title: Purchase Frequency & Cross-Sell Analysis
summary: Deep analysis of customer purchase patterns and product relationships in a $2.3B category that revealed a $265M+ revenue opportunity and directly drove product feature development.

title: Global Metrics Platform (21+ Marketplaces)
summary: Extended a North America analytics framework to global scale, creating standardized input metrics views covering financials, operational metrics, and technology parity across 21+ worldwide marketplaces.

title: LinkedIn Job Scraper
summary: Automated job postings collection from LinkedIn using Selenium, with salary extraction, pagination handling, and CSV export for trend analysis.

title: TikTok EDA & Hypothesis Testing
summary: Exploratory data analysis and statistical hypothesis testing on TikTok claim verification data using Pandas, Seaborn, and SciPy.

title: Automatic Reddit Analyzer
summary: Script that pulls top posts from r/AITA, analyzes comment sentiment votes, calculates an 'Asshole Ratio', and exports metrics hourly to Google Sheets.

title: Azure VM Mapping Tool
summary: Maps on-prem VM inventory to Azure SKUs using the Azure Resource API to estimate monthly cloud migration costs across pricing tiers.

title: Recruiter Log & Respond Workflow
summary: n8n automation that classifies incoming emails with GPT-4, auto-labels Gmail, summarizes recruiter outreach, and logs everything to Google Sheets.
